title: Mounted Local Catalogue Dashboard Route
summary: Mounted the Catalogue dashboard route shell in the local Studio app server and retired its old Jekyll route shell.
effect: The local Studio app now serves `/studio/catalogue/?mode=manage` with the existing dashboard metric module and grouped Catalogue link layout. Dashboard links now point to manage-mode local Catalogue routes. The old Jekyll shell has been removed, leaving the remaining catalogue-facing shells outside Jekyll except for future API consolidation and non-catalogue route families.
verification: Python and JavaScript syntax checks passed for the touched Studio app, config, and smoke files
